'''Galleros Nul''' was the [[Mandated Commander of the People of Zelos]], after declaring martial law,<ref name="PoG2" /> and the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Zelos II]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had a secret [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on the planet in the [[Valley of Umbra]]. [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] operative [[Jai Raventhorn]] was captured by the base and interrogated. However, she escaped her imprisonment and took the commanding [[Major/Legends|major]] captive. She forced the major to call Nul and expose the Imperial presence. It was likely that Nul then called an air strike on the garrison.<ref name="gs">{{StoryCite|story=Gathering Shadows|book=Tales from the New Republic}}</ref>

After the Imperial presence was exposed, Nul was convinced to join the fledgling [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="gs" />
